Lifestyle & Cleaning

Immaculate Living,
Without Compromise.

OPV's household services bring elite, DBS-cleared professionals directly to your residence. Every detail handled. Every surface perfected.

View Services

Our Services

Curated household and lifestyle management for discerning principals.

cleaning_services

One-Off Deep Clean

Comprehensive top-to-bottom deep clean including silk fabric steam treatment, marble care, and bespoke surface detailing.

home

Recurring Housekeeping

Scheduled professional housekeeping on a daily, weekly, or fortnightly basis. Dedicated teams, consistent standards.

dry_cleaning

Garment Care & Laundry

Expert laundering, dry cleaning, and wardrobe management. We handle couture, cashmere, and leather with specialist precision.

apartment

Property Turnover

Full property preparation between tenancies or guest visits. Hotel-grade turnover for private residences and investment properties.

iron

Ironing & Laundry

Precision ironing and pressing for formal wardrobes, fine linens, and bespoke garments. Collection and delivery included.

hub

OPV Smart Integration

Fully managed household operations: scheduling, restocking, staff coordination, and smart home management through your OPV guardian.

The Standard of Trust

Every operative in our household services network passes the most stringent verification process in the UK private services industry.

verified_user

DBS Cleared

Enhanced Disclosure & Barring Service checks on every operative.

security

Fully Insured

£5M public liability insurance per operative.

workspace_premium

OPV Vetted

Our own 12-point verification process beyond standard checks.

lock

Strict NDA

All operatives sign comprehensive confidentiality agreements.

Common Questions

How are cleaning teams selected?

All operatives go through our multi-stage verification including DBS Enhanced checks, reference verification, skills assessment, and a trial placement before being admitted to the OPV network.

Can I request a regular assigned team?

Yes. We strongly encourage dedicated team assignments for recurring clients. Your preference is noted and the same professionals attend each appointment where possible.

Are specialty materials handled differently?

Absolutely. We maintain specialists in natural stone, antique furniture, couture textiles, and smart home systems. Please specify your needs when booking.

What is the minimum booking?

Standard bookings begin at 3 hours. Estate management and full-property turnovers are priced on scope. Contact our concierge for a tailored assessment.

Book a Service

Our household concierge team will arrange your first appointment within 24 hours of inquiry.

ARRANGE SERVICE

Opulent Vault is Manchester's curated luxury lifestyle concierge marketplace.
